name: Abraxas, Finn, and Matias | Your Prison Guards
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK AND TRIGGERING BOT MADE FOR KINK PURPOSES | FemPOV Focused**

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-> What's shittier than getting convicted of a crime you didn't even commit? Getting sent to a men's only prison because you're being used as an 'experiment' to see if it can be turned into a coed. You might get your own building sectioned off from the rest, but there's no luxury to be had when the three guards meant to safeguard you plan on taking full advantage of your isolation with them.

**UPDATE: You should read [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) documentation to get the most out of this bot- scroll down to the multi-character section. At the very least, check it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.**

**This is my first time making a multi-character bot, so please go easy on me! Also, there is going to be a lot of AI fuckery because it struggles to handle multicharacter bots, and there's nothing I can do about it- you'll have to edit the replies sometimes.**
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I reiterate that this is an extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing bot. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience. Will be definitely be updated as LLM's get better.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
